source: Mapzen Terrain Tiles / AWS Open Data
surfaceImagery: Sentinel-2 cloudless 2016 by EOX IT Services GmbH
sourceTileProjection: EPSG:3857 (Web Mercator source tiles, cropped and resized to a square texture — not reprojected to a geodetic CRS)
rendering: satellite albedo with multi-scale multidirectional shaded relief
processingSteps: Terrarium elevation tiles decoded to meters; Sentinel-2 cloudless tiles mosaicked, cropped to bbox and resized (Lanczos) to width x height; multi-scale multidirectional hillshade blended with satellite albedo for the color/normal/mask textures.
realtimeNotice: Static historical snapshot (SRTM ~2000, Sentinel-2 cloudless 2016 edition); not real-time imagery or elevation.
